task_description: Block B implementation: Phase 7 (Search & Scale utilities for 6 lakh documents), Phase 8 (Performance infrastructure), Phase 9 (Crash Protection defensive utilities). All additive - new files only, no modifications to existing working code. Each utility has comprehensive tests.

verification.summary: TypeScript: 0 errors. Root smoke tests: 5/5 pass. Feature tests: 617 pass, 2 pre-existing failures (useThrottle, ThemeContext) unchanged. Vite build succeeds in 6.79s. Semantic review v2 verdict: APPROVED. 351 new tests across 15 test files covering all 20 source modules.
